mapper.select: SELECT id, business_domain_id, name, sort_order, is_default FROM ticket_priority_level WHERE business_domain_id = #{domainId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, business_domain_id, name, sort_order, is_default, status FROM ticket_priority_level WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_priority_level ( business_domain_id, code, name, sort_order, is_default, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{businessDomainId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{sortOrder}, #{isDefault}, 'active', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) )
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_priority_level SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_default = #{isDefault}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ticket_priority_level WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId}
